compatibility_claim: This object records a bounded CSLib-facing adapter schema for finite graph certificate data.

adapter_fields.edges: finite edge relation encoded as endpoint pairs
adapter_fields.certificate: bounded external-validation payload checked by this repository

non_claims: No upstream CSLib import is claimed.
No CSLib validation of URF is claimed.
No unrestricted theorem closure is claimed.
improvement_metric: adds one concrete CSLib-facing finite graph certificate adapter object beyond the baseline evidence shell
